title: How modify a monday_doc content?

posts.author: kolber (Gabriel da Silva Kolber)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team is integrating the ticket creation in Monday Dev.

We have some routines in our backend that create tickets for us.
We have a formatted template for this and the idea is to put in the body of our tickets this information.

How we can create a ticket via API and make these inputs in the Item Description?

image1157×936 19.3 KB
